title: Immersive Korean Font(Galmuri9)
description: Better KR Font for Minecraft korean player (Galmuri9)
body:
# Better Font for Korean Minecraft Player


-------------------------
### 갈무리9 폰트를 사용한 리소스팩입니다.

> https://quiple.dev/galmuri

 ---------------------

## How to install
> Download Better Korean.zip
>
> "Windows + R" and go to %appdata%
>
> Copy .zip to /Roaming/.minecraft/resourcepacks



### ⚠️ Important Setting

**이 리소스팩은 '강제 유니코드 글꼴' 옵션이 꺼져 있어야 정상적으로 출력됩니다. * 설정 > 언어 > 강제 유니코드 글꼴: 꺼짐 (OFF)**

-------------------------------------


### Original

![Orignal KR font](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ffb3a2fc9013c8caa026dfd27ee2fe43c422ab6_0.webp)


### ResourcePack

![Resourcepack KR font](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06e3e595a8fb68b78dd33e72bfaca99f22741455_0.webp)



------------------------------------
**Pack Format: 42 (Optimized for Minecraft 1.21.11) **

Font File: Galmuri9.ttf (Included under OFL 1.1 License) * Compatibility: Works with Fabric, Sodium, and Iris Shaders.

### Feel free to use this Resourcepack in your Modpacks
